notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, second baseman Luke Keaschall to shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Kody Clemens. Daulton Varsho to 3rd. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.
